examples: Mineralogically, zoisite is a member of the epidote group, the other members of which are clinozoisite and allanite.
The main minerals are plagioclase, zoisite, hornblende, and the minor minerals were mica, sphene, prehnite and so on.
Natural zoisite is a rare gemstone because of its rarity, therefore some counterfeits of zoisite exist on gemstone market.
